name: Incident Response
description: Incident Response delivers defensive, authorized, auditable security analysis with explicit scope boundaries and risk handling.
longDescription:
Incident Response delivers defensive, authorized, auditable security analysis with explicit scope boundaries and risk handling.

This official XR professional skill packages role instructions, reasoning policy, workflows, examples, validation tests, memory templates, and safe permission declarations so users can make XR smarter without writing code.

XR 2.1E official Skill hardening: includes a professional playbook, diagnostic prompt, operating manual, permission docs, quality tests, advanced examples, quality-gate workflow, and memory templates.

commands.name: incident-response
commands.title: Incident Response
commands.description: Apply the Incident Response skill to a task.
commands.prompt: Use the Incident Response skill and produce professional, validated output.

commands.name: incident-response-doctor
commands.title: Incident Response Doctor
commands.description: Run the Incident Response Skill quality and readiness checklist.
commands.prompt: Use Incident Response to inspect the current task or artifact and return readiness, risks, validation gaps, and next actions.

chatActions.prompt: Apply Incident Response expertise to the current task.

planners.title: Incident Response Planner
planners.prompt: Create a concise professional plan before execution.

agentBehaviors.title: Incident Response Behavior
agentBehaviors.description: Professional behavior profile for Incident Response.
agentBehaviors.prompt: Operate as a careful, safety-aware Incident Response.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Identify objective, audience, constraints, available inputs, risk level, and acceptance criteria.

steps.title: Plan
steps.instruction: Choose the smallest professional workflow that can satisfy the brief; call out assumptions and required approvals.

steps.title: Execute
steps.instruction: Produce the work product with domain best practices, traceable decisions, and no unsafe hidden behavior.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Check completeness, correctness, safety, edge cases, and user-specific constraints before final handoff.

workflows.title: Incident Response Professional Delivery
workflows.description: End-to-end professional workflow for Incident Response.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Confirm authorization, scope, assets, timelines, and safety constraints.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.instruction: Collect and normalize evidence without destroying provenance.

steps.title: Produce
steps.instruction: Triage severity, blast radius, affected systems, and likely root cause.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Recommend containment, eradication, recovery, detection, and prevention.

steps.title: Handoff
steps.instruction: Produce an executive summary plus technical appendix and validation checklist.

workflows.title: Incident Response Quality Gate
workflows.description: Pre-final validation gate for Incident Response.

steps.title: Scope Check
steps.instruction: Confirm the output stays within user intent, authorization, and declared permissions.

steps.title: Evidence Check
steps.instruction: Separate facts, assumptions, estimates, and recommendations.

steps.title: Risk Check
steps.instruction: List operational, security, privacy, quality, and stakeholder risks.

steps.title: Finalize
steps.instruction: Produce the final answer with validation and next steps.

memoryTemplates.contentTemplate: For Incident Response, remember the user's preferred output format, standards, and recurring constraints.
When using Incident Response, remember project-specific quality standards, constraints, and preferred validation methods.
When Incident Response finishes, remember reusable handoff format, recurring risks, and accepted output structure.
